role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused on script analysis (Kanji) and place-name formatting on the utility pole.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation density, and climate cues consistent with the role.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Discussed plant species (hedges, forest types) and biome characteristics.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road infrastructure standards (bollards, pole markings) and driving context.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain features (architecture, infrastructure) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. All five agents correctly identified Japan as the primary candidate with high confidence, supported by distinct visual evidence (Kanji, specific bollards, roof styles). The tournament correctly resolved the minor South Korea ambiguity in favor of Japan based on the strength of the regulatory and linguistic evidence.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Accurately identified the Kanji '189南' on the pole.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Correctly described the forested hills and road width.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified the manicured hedges and forest density.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly identified the white/orange delineator posts and pole plate.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly linked architectural styles to the region.
